name: How is fault decided in Utah workplace injury cases?
description: No fault needed in workers' comp.[2]

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in Utah workplace injury cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: No fault needed in workers' comp.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Fault irrelevant—workers' comp is no-fault system.** Benefits regardless of blame.[2] Key factors: Excludes willful misconduct. Third-party fault allows suits. Simplifies claims, focuses on injury.
